task_completion.description: The document is present in the 'Public Reports' section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the 'Public Reports' section (path: /default-domain/sections/Public-Reports) open in the Nuxeo interface, containing the published document.

task_completion.description: The published document has the correct title 'Annual Report 2023'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title of the document listed in the 'Public Reports' section is exactly 'Annual Report 2023'.

task_completion.description: The document was published as a proxy, indicating a proper Publish action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for evidence that the 'Publish' action was used (e.g., a Publish dialog), or the document in the section showing a version number (like 1.0) or 'Published' status, distinguishing it from a standard copied or moved file.

task_completion.description: The original document remains in the Projects workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the original 'Annual Report 2023' document still present in the Projects workspace, or confirm that a 'Publish' action was used (which inherently keeps the original) rather than a 'Move' action.

task_completion.description: Confirmation that the state changed and the publish action was successfully executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, toast notification, or the final screen confirming the document was successfully published to the target section.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Nuxeo web UI being interacted with in a browser, rather than terminal commands, scripts, or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent navigated the interface to publish the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps such as navigating to the Projects workspace, selecting the document, opening the Publish dialog, and selecting the target section.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected outcome in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions must take place within the actual Nuxeo Platform application, not a text editor or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source document 'Annual Report 2023' is located at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023. The target section is /default-domain/sections/Public-Reports. The task requires using the 'Publish' feature to create a proxy in the target section while keeping the original document in the source workspace. Scoring requires: document in section (35 pts), correct title 'Annual Report 2023' (25 pts), proxy status (15 pts), original document exists (15 pts), and state change confirmation (10 pts).
